title: racosperma tripterum
intro: Racosperma tripterum, also known as the Rough Pea, is a legume plant native to Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can aid in treating various health issues. The plant's extracts have been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune system function. Racosperma tripterum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
